info.name: Runloop Agents API
info.description:
Register, version, and mount Agents — packaged agent definitions sourced from Git, npm, pip, or storage objects that can be installed on Devboxes for fast, reproducible agent execution.

Contact Support:
 Name: Runloop AI Support
 Email: support@runloop.ai

request.description: Returns devbox counts grouped by agent name. This endpoint efficiently aggregates devbox counts for all agents in a single request, avoiding N+1 query patterns.

response.name: Successfully retrieved devbox counts by agent name.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Forbidden. Account does not have devbox capability.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

query.description: The limit of items to return. Default is 20. Max is 5000.
Load the next page of data starting after the item with the given ID.
Filter agents by name (partial match supported).
Search by agent ID or name.
Filter by version. Use 'latest' to get the most recently created agent.
If true (default), includes total_count in the response. Set to false to skip the count query for better performance on large datasets.

request.description: List all public Agents with pagination support.

response.name: Successfully retrieved list of public Agents.

response.name: Agent created successfully. Returns the Agent with metadata.
